category_sources: source_facts.description says it synchronizes emails between repositories; official README describes OfflineIMAP as software for synchronizing IMAP mailboxes to local Maildirs.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses OfflineIMAP as the project name; source_facts.name is offlineimap.
docs_sources: Official README links to the OfflineIMAP website and wiki; official documentation page provides guides, FAQ, man pages, and API docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/OfflineIMAP/offlineimap3, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions email synchronization; official README describes IMAP mailbox downloads and synchronization.
